channel.title: Copilot on AI Survival Blog - Investment Strategies for the AI Era

item.title: The AI Productivity Stack That Actually Works for Non-Developers (2026)
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot. Notion Agents. Zapier with AI. Here's what actually delivers ROI in 2026 - and the exact workflows you can steal.

item.title: AI Coding Tools for Non-Developers: Which One Should You Actually Use?
item.description: Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex — compared for non-developers who want to get real work done.
